Supervisory focus areas 2026
Supervisory focus areas 2026
08.01.26
•
Supervision and Regulation
Through its supervisory activities, the FMA ensures that financial intermediaries adequately address potential risks. A central element of this is the assessment of the risk situation for the financial center and the supervised financial intermediaries. The FMA aligns its supervisory priorities with the risk situation, thereby strengthening resilience to the identified risks.
Schwerpunkte der Aufsicht

The authority will monitor the priorities set

The trends, risks and supervisory priorities presented were
identified
in a careful analysis of the market environment, regulatory developments, the Union Strategic
Supervisory
Priorities
(USSP), the work programs of the European Supervisory Authorities, the recommendations of the European Systemic Risk Board (ESRB) and the results of the FMA's supervisory activities.
